summary: A minor editorial change was made to the display text of a hyperlink within the Victorian Security of Payment Act (SOPA) guidance section.
analysis:
### 1) What specifically changed
The only change identified is in the `Generative AI: basic guidance` document, specifically within the section discussing the 'Security of Payment Act (SOPA) in Victoria'. The display text for the hyperlink pointing to the 'Building and Plumbing Commission' website was updated. 

**OLD TEXT:** `Building and Plumbing Commission`
**NEW TEXT:** `Overview of SOP Act | Building and Plumbing Commission`

The underlying URL associated with this link appears to remain unchanged. This is a clarification of the link's title to be more descriptive of its content.

### 2) Who is affected
Primarily, this affects NSW Government staff and any other users who consult the 'Generative AI: basic guidance' for information, specifically regarding references to external resources about the Security of Payment Act (SOPA) in Victoria. The impact is minimal, as it only clarifies the title of an external link.

### 3) Whether this impacts user rights, data privacy, or liability
This change has no direct impact on user rights, data privacy, or liability. It is a minor editorial adjustment to improve the clarity and descriptiveness of an external hyperlink within the guidance document. The core policy and legal obligations outlined in the 'Generative AI: basic guidance' remain unchanged.

### 4) Any action required
No specific action is required by users or agencies as a result of this change. It is an informational update to improve navigation and clarity when seeking details on the Victorian Security of Payment Act. Users will encounter a slightly more informative link title when accessing the relevant external website.
